PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Pro Tem Russell Davis, clerk-beth wilber, dept. 505: cause called for small claims. Plaintiff, Eyad Ibrahim, appears in Pro Per for Ed & Danny's Market and check cashing. No appearance by defendant Julio Solorzano. Plaintiff's evidence was returned in open court. Not reported.
